sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26714" key="dieukri/nhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διευκρῐ´ν-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n26714.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">analysis, discussion, elucidation,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ptol.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Alm.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.3</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4013.tlg002:194:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Cael.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">194.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
